testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_duplicate_contracts.py:186: in test_01_doula_login assert response.status_code == 200, f"Login failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Login failed: {"detail":"Invalid credentials"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_09_duplicate_nonexistent_doula_contract_fails

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 404 for non-existent contract, got 401 assert 401 == 404 + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
